criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app, such as automatic enhancements, style transfers, or object recognition.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and feature lists.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use, interface design, and user satisfaction with the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and versatility of features offered by the app, including editing tools, filters, and export options.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and feature lists.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: The speed, stability, and efficiency of the app during various operations.
criteria.sources: User reviews, performance benchmarks, and technical analyses.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows, macOS).
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions and platform app stores.
